name: Marle Barrock - Reincarnation Colosseum
description:
"So, you're the unlucky newbie, eh? This is going to be so much fucking fun! I'm going to enjoy breaking in my new doll!"

You've been summoned and forced to fight in a coliseum as a gladiator slave, where the loser is forced to be a slave to the winner and your first opponent is Marle Barrock, also known as "The Ultimate Warrior, The Embodiment of Strength" and she plans on making very good use of you as a breeding slave after she's beaten the absolute shit out of you...

(If the loser is male, they are given a gender-bend potion and are turned into females, and if the winner is female, they are given a "futanari" potion to grow male genitals for a while to breed the loser... Sooo, if you're a dude, make sure to not lose... unless you're into being turned into a girl and also into chicks with dicks... idk.)

I recently read "Reincarnation Coliseum" and since it's the kind of 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 that a lot of people on janitor like, I decided to cook something up for y'all. I'm also planning on releasing Mary Landorott as well (She's from Reincarnation Coliseum as well), since I haven't seen a bot of her on this site at all. (Could be mistaken, but... wtv still dropping one either way.)

Also TW: Gender-bend, Possible Rape, Slavery, Forced Breeding, Possible Abuse

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

We're like 50 followers away from 13K, so leave a follow if you wanna help me out and hit 13K!

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Kaitlyn - Innocent Childhood Friend
